  "originalScript": {
    "extract": "EXT. BONDI BEACH - PROMENADE BENCH - GOLDEN HOUR\n\nScarlett sits on a weathered bench, knees pulled up. She twists the lipstick open again, applies it while looking out at the ocean. Wind moves her hair across her face.\n\nSCARLETT (V.O.)\nFresh. Sensory. Yours.",

        "character": "SCARLETT",
        "line": "Fresh. Sensory. Yours.",

    "durationSeconds": 10,
    "location": "EXT. BONDI BEACH - PROMENADE BENCH",

  },
  "prompts": {
    "visual": {
      "fullPrompt": "Cinematic still on 35mm film stock with natural grain, Scarlett in a loose linen shirt sits on a weathered wooden bench with knees drawn up, body angled toward the ocean as she twists open the lipstick and brings it to her lips in mid-application while gazing out at the horizon, wind catching her hair across her face, the Bondi Beach promenade stretches into soft focus with pale sand and gentle waves under a warm golden hour sky, distant surfers visible on the horizon line, shallow depth of field emphasizing the moment of pause with rich textures in the aged bench wood and linen fabric, natural directional side light from the setting sun casting long warm highlights and soft coral-tinted shadows across the scene, captured with a 50mm lens at eye level in a slightly low handheld composition that feels intimate and effortless.",
      "negativePrompt": "blurry motion, harsh artificial lighting, text overlays, floating elements, modern furniture, indoor setting",

        "sceneDescription": "Scarlett on a weathered promenade bench applying lipstick while looking out to sea during golden hour",
        "subject": "SCARLETT in loose linen shirt mid-application on bench",
        "environment": "Bondi Beach promenade with weathered bench, ocean horizon, pale sand and distant waves under golden hour sky",
        "lighting": "Natural golden hour side light with warm highlights and soft coral-tinted shadows",
        "camera": "50mm lens at eye level, slightly low handheld framing with shallow depth of field",
        "composition": "Intimate pause moment, subject centered with ocean receding into bokeh background",
        "style": "Modern social-first product photography with tactile editorial energy and 35mm film grain",
        "technical": "16:9 aspect ratio, high resolution, natural grain, true-to-life color grading",
        "atmosphere": "Fresh, sensory, effortlessly cool coastal lifestyle mood"
      }
    }
  },
  "continuity": {

<DIRECTOR_STYLE>
(Strictly apply camera movement and pacing preferences)
{
  "mood": "Fresh, sensory, and effortlessly cool",
  "artStyle": "Modern social-first product photography with tactile, editorial energy. Products shown in real-life context -- hands opening packaging, fingers pressing textures, products on bathroom shelves, kitchen counters, rumpled linen. Close-up detail shots emphasize material and finish. Flat-lays with curated minimal arrangements. Color-matched backgrounds that complement the product. Every frame feels like something you would screenshot and save",
  "lighting": "Bright natural window light with clean directional shadows. Direct on-camera flash for punchy editorial energy on select shots. No heavy diffusion -- let light feel real and immediate. Golden hour warmth for lifestyle moments. High-key and airy overall with pops of contrast",
  "colorPalette": [
    "#FFFFFF",
    "#F0E6D3",
    "#D4536D",
    "#1A1A1A",
    "#E8F4E8"
  ],
  "cameraWork": "Dynamic mix of handheld and locked shots with consistent energy. Handheld with natural micro-movement for lifestyle moments -- hands interacting, daily rituals, real context. Quick-cut to locked beauty frames for hero product shots. Macro details on textures and surfaces. Overhead flat-lays directly above. Eye-level and slightly above angles. Shallow depth of field on tactile details. Energetic pacing -- no lingering, every frame earns its time",
  "referenceFilms": [
    "Rhode Skin Instagram",
    "Glossier Visual Identity",
    "Summer Fridays Campaigns",
    "Drunk Elephant Content"
  ],
  "colorGrading": "Clean and bright with true-to-life color. Whites are crisp, skin tones warm and natural. Minimal processing -- the product looks like it does in your hand. Slight warmth in highlights, lifted shadows keeping everything airy. One accent color pops against neutral base"
}
</DIRECTOR_STYLE>
